description_long: This is a single, high-ankle winter boot with a thick, insulated upper section and a robust, rounded toe. The upper part of the boot is made from a dark, slightly wrinkled fabric or synthetic material, providing warmth and weather resistance. The lower section, including the toe and heel, is constructed from a smoother, more durable material, likely rubber or treated leather, designed for protection and grip. The boot has a wide opening at the top, suggesting it is easy to slip on and off, and there are no visible laces or fasteners. The sole is not visible, but the overall shape and construction indicate it is built for cold or wet urban environments. The boot appears clean and structurally intact, with no visible signs of wear or branding.
description: A high-ankle, slip-on winter boot with a thick, insulated upper and a durable, rounded toe, made for cold urban environments. The boot is dark in color, with a smooth lower section and a slightly wrinkled upper.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide, round opening and the wrinkled upper section, with the toe area partially visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the boot's overall profile, the smooth lower section, and the transition between the upper and lower materials.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizing the tall, insulated shaft and the back seam, with the heel area visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the smooth, rounded toe and the continuous, slightly wrinkled upper material.
